requirement_topic.en: Market Access — In-country importer, GSA conformity/destination inspection and Energy Commission labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——本地进口商、GSA合格评定/到岸检验与能源委员会标签
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——本地進口商、GSA合格評定/到岸檢驗與能源委員會標籤

summary.en: Ghana market access for lithium batteries and power banks runs through an in-country importer of record rather than a foreign-manufacturer self-declaration. The importer is responsible for clearing goods through the Ghana Standards Authority （GSA） conformity-assessment and destination-inspection regime at ports such as Tema and Takoradi, presenting test evidence against the applicable GS/IEC standards, and meeting customs and import-documentation requirements. Separately, the Energy Commission administers appliance energy-efficiency labelling and minimum energy-performance standards （MEPS） for regulated appliance categories; while lithium cells themselves are typically outside MEPS, exporters should check whether any bundled appliance or charger falls within Energy Commission labelling scope. There is no foreign 'authorised representative' construct equivalent to the EU model; the practical anchor is the registered local importer.
summary.zh: 锂电池及移动电源进入加纳市场，依托记录在案的本地进口商，而非境外制造商自我声明。进口商负责在特马（Tema）、塔科拉迪（Takoradi）等港口完成加纳标准局（GSA）合格评定与到岸检验，提交依据适用GS/IEC标准的测试证据，并满足海关和进口单证要求。此外，能源委员会对受监管电器类别管理能效标签和最低能效标准（MEPS）；锂电芯本身通常不在MEPS范围内，但出口商应核查任何随附电器或充电器是否落入能源委员会标签范围。加纳不存在与欧盟模式对应的境外授权代表制度；实际依托是注册本地进口商。
summary.zht: 鋰電池及行動電源進入迦納市場，依託記錄在案的本地進口商，而非境外製造商自我聲明。進口商負責在特馬（Tema）、塔科拉迪（Takoradi）等港口完成迦納標準局（GSA）合格評定與到岸檢驗，提交依據適用GS/IEC標準的測試證據，並滿足海關和進口單證要求。此外，能源委員會對受監管電器類別管理能效標籤和最低能效標準（MEPS）；鋰電芯本身通常不在MEPS範圍內，但出口商應核查任何隨附電器或充電器是否落入能源委員會標籤範圍。迦納不存在與歐盟模式對應的境外授權代表制度；實際依託是註冊本地進口商。

standards_or_laws: GSA conformity assessment / destination inspection programme (clearance at Tema and Takoradi)
Energy Commission appliance labelling and minimum energy-performance standards (MEPS) for regulated appliance categories
In-country importer of record responsible for customs clearance and conformity demonstration

summary.en: China's domestic market-access framework relies on CCC certification （where in catalogue） and product-standard compliance enforced by SAMR, with domestic manufacturers/importers responsible for placing products on the Chinese market. There is no Chinese mechanism that designates an in-Ghana importer or completes Ghanaian destination inspection. A Chinese business licence, CCC certificate, or domestic test report does not appoint a Ghana importer of record, does not clear GSA conformity assessment, and does not satisfy any Energy Commission labelling obligation.
summary.zh: 中国国内市场准入框架依赖CCC认证（若在目录内）及由SAMR执行的产品标准合规，由国内制造商/进口商负责将产品投放中国市场。中国不存在指定加纳进口商或完成加纳到岸检验的机制。中国营业执照、CCC证书或国内测试报告，既不能指定加纳记录进口商，也不能完成GSA合格评定，更不能满足任何能源委员会标签义务。
summary.zht: 中國國內市場准入框架依賴CCC認證（若在目錄內）及由SAMR執行的產品標準合規，由國內製造商/進口商負責將產品投放中國市場。中國不存在指定迦納進口商或完成迦納到岸檢驗的機制。中國營業執照、CCC證書或國內測試報告，既不能指定迦納記錄進口商，也不能完成GSA合格評定，更不能滿足任何能源委員會標籤義務。

standards_or_laws: CCC compulsory certification and SAMR product-standard enforcement (domestic market placement)
No Chinese equivalent for appointing a Ghana importer of record or clearing GSA destination inspection

gap.en: The core market-access gap is that responsibility shifts to a registered Ghana importer, and clearance happens at the port through GSA destination inspection — neither of which a Chinese certificate completes. Key gaps: (1) exporters must work with an in-country importer of record who carries the GSA conformity/clearance obligation at Tema or Takoradi; (2) GSA may require test evidence against GS/IEC standards and may inspect or sample on arrival; (3) if any bundled appliance or charger is within Energy Commission scope, MEPS/energy-labelling obligations apply separately. Exporters should confirm the importer arrangement early, align test reports to GS/IEC, and verify Energy Commission labelling applicability for any accompanying appliance.
gap.zh: 核心市场准入差距在于责任转移至注册加纳进口商，且放行通过港口的GSA到岸检验完成——二者均非中国证书所能完成。主要差距：（1）出口商须与承担特马或塔科拉迪GSA合格评定/清关义务的本地记录进口商合作；（2）GSA可能要求依据GS/IEC标准的测试证据，并可能在到货时检验或抽样；（3）若任何随附电器或充电器在能源委员会范围内，则另行适用MEPS/能效标签义务。出口商应尽早确认进口商安排、使测试报告对齐GS/IEC，并核实任何随附电器的能源委员会标签适用性。
gap.zht: 核心市場准入差距在於責任轉移至註冊迦納進口商，且放行透過港口的GSA到岸檢驗完成——二者均非中國證書所能完成。主要差距：（1）出口商須與承擔特馬或塔科拉迪GSA合格評定/清關義務的本地記錄進口商合作；（2）GSA可能要求依據GS/IEC標準的測試證據，並可能在到貨時檢驗或抽樣；（3）若任何隨附電器或充電器在能源委員會範圍內，則另行適用MEPS/能效標籤義務。出口商應盡早確認進口商安排、使測試報告對齊GS/IEC，並核實任何隨附電器的能源委員會標籤適用性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — registered in-country importer of record plus GSA conformity assessment / destination inspection; Energy Commission labelling/MEPS mandatory for regulated appliance categories where applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — CCC (where in catalogue) and SAMR product-standard enforcement; no provision for Ghana importer or destination inspection

source.publisher: Energy Commission of Ghana — appliance labelling and standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ghana market access runs through a registered in-country importer of record and GSA conformity assessment / destination inspection at Tema or Takoradi, with Energy Commission labelling/MEPS applying to regulated appliance categories where relevant. Chinese CCC certification or domestic reports do not appoint a Ghana importer, clear destination inspection, or satisfy Energy Commission labelling. Exporters should secure an importer arrangement, align evidence to GS/IEC, and check Energy Commission applicability for any bundled appliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加纳市场准入依托注册本地记录进口商及在特马或塔科拉迪的GSA合格评定/到岸检验，能源委员会标签/MEPS在相关受监管电器类别适用。中国CCC认证或国内报告不能指定加纳进口商、完成到岸检验或满足能源委员会标签。出口商应确保进口商安排、使证据对齐GS/IEC，并核查任何随附电器的能源委员会适用性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 迦納市場准入依託註冊本地記錄進口商及在特馬或塔科拉迪的GSA合格評定/到岸檢驗，能源委員會標籤/MEPS在相關受監管電器類別適用。中國CCC認證或國內報告不能指定迦納進口商、完成到岸檢驗或滿足能源委員會標籤。出口商應確保進口商安排、使證據對齊GS/IEC，並核查任何隨附電器的能源委員會適用性。
